content:
Gerund and Infinitive

Verb တချို့နောက်မှာ V-ing (Gerund) လာတယ်။ Verb တချို့နောက်မှာ to + Verb (Infinitive) လာတယ်။ ဒါကို မှတ်ထားရမယ်။

Structure/Formula: Gerund = Verb + V-ing | Infinitive = Verb + to + V1

👉 Gerund: He enjoys playing football. → Infinitive: He wants to play football.

👉 Gerund: She avoids eating junk food. → Infinitive: She decides to eat healthy food.

👉 Gerund: They finish doing homework. → Infinitive: They plan to do homework.

👉 Gerund: I mind opening the window. → Infinitive: I agree to open the window.

🔑 Key Points:

  • enjoy, finish, mind, avoid, suggest နောက်မှာ V-ing (Gerund) သာ လာရမယ်။
  • want, decide, plan, agree, hope နောက်မှာ to + V1 (Infinitive) သာ လာရမယ်။

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • enjoy, finish နောက်မှာ to + V1 မသုံးရပါ။ V-ing သာ သုံးရမယ်။ (I enjoy to play မဟုတ်ပါ၊ I enjoy playing သာ သုံးရပါမယ်)။
